recipes.name: Client Adoption Report
recipes.description: Default customer-facing adoption report with summary, KPI health, trend, feature usage, risks, next steps, and source notes.
recipes.audience: Customer executives, implementation leaders, and customer success teams

slide_sequence.title: Client Adoption Report
slide_sequence.content_focus: Client, period, and approved report context.

slide_sequence.title: Discussion Flow
slide_sequence.content_focus: Executive summary, KPI health, trend, feature adoption, risks, and next steps.

slide_sequence.title: Executive Summary
slide_sequence.content_focus: Current adoption health, business impact, and decisions needed.

slide_sequence.title: Adoption KPI Scorecard
slide_sequence.content_focus: Active users, licensed users, adoption score, projects, and mobile usage.

slide_sequence.title: Usage Trend
slide_sequence.content_focus: Adoption score and active user movement across periods.

slide_sequence.title: Feature Adoption
slide_sequence.content_focus: Workflow usage and strongest or weakest feature signals.

slide_sequence.title: Risks & Recommendations
slide_sequence.content_focus: Risk summary tied to specific recommended actions.

slide_sequence.title: Next Steps
slide_sequence.content_focus: Near-term operating actions.

slide_sequence.title: Appendix: Source Notes
slide_sequence.content_focus: Source data and generation controls.

recipes.name: Executive Adoption Update
recipes.description: Shorter leadership update focused on adoption health, trajectory, risk, and decisions.
recipes.audience: Executive sponsors, steering committees, and account leadership

slide_sequence.title: Executive Adoption Update
slide_sequence.content_focus: Client, period, and executive update context.

slide_sequence.title: Leadership Discussion
slide_sequence.content_focus: Adoption health, trend, risk, and decisions.

slide_sequence.title: Our goal for you today
slide_sequence.content_focus: Keep {client}'s adoption momentum working as *a system, not a one-time push*.

slide_sequence.title: Executive Readout
slide_sequence.content_focus: Decision-ready adoption narrative.

slide_sequence.title: Adoption Health
slide_sequence.content_focus: Current KPI health and licensed user coverage.

slide_sequence.title: Momentum Trend
slide_sequence.content_focus: Adoption and active-user trajectory.

slide_sequence.title: Leadership Actions
slide_sequence.content_focus: Risks that require sponsor action.

slide_sequence.title: Decisions & Next Steps
slide_sequence.content_focus: Executive decisions and near-term owners.

slide_sequence.title: Appendix: Source Notes
slide_sequence.content_focus: Source data and generation controls.

recipes.name: Risk Remediation Plan
recipes.description: Action-oriented plan for adoption risk, stalled workflows, and practical remediation.
recipes.audience: Customer success leaders, implementation teams, and project operations owners

slide_sequence.title: Adoption Risk Remediation Plan
slide_sequence.content_focus: Client, period, and remediation context.

slide_sequence.title: Remediation Flow
slide_sequence.content_focus: Risk, root signals, recommendations, and operating cadence.

slide_sequence.title: Our goal for you today
slide_sequence.content_focus: Enable {client}'s teams to be *smoke detectors, not firefighters*.

slide_sequence.title: Risk Summary
slide_sequence.content_focus: Current risk and business implication.

slide_sequence.title: Priority Risks & Recommendations
slide_sequence.content_focus: Risks paired with actions.

slide_sequence.title: Health Signals
slide_sequence.content_focus: KPI evidence for remediation focus.

slide_sequence.title: Workflow Gaps
slide_sequence.content_focus: Feature usage gaps and workflow ownership.

slide_sequence.title: 30-60-90 Day Action Plan
slide_sequence.content_focus: Remediation actions with owners, timing, and status.

slide_sequence.title: Appendix: Source Notes
slide_sequence.content_focus: Source data and generation controls.

recipes.name: Quarterly Business Review
recipes.description: Executive QBR structure for value delivered, adoption momentum, product usage, risks, and next-quarter priorities.
recipes.audience: Executive sponsors, account leadership, customer success, and product stakeholders

slide_sequence.title: Quarterly Business Review
slide_sequence.content_focus: Client, quarter, and executive review context.

slide_sequence.title: QBR Flow
slide_sequence.content_focus: Value story, adoption health, product usage, risks, and next-quarter priorities.

slide_sequence.title: Our goal for you today
slide_sequence.content_focus: Turn {client}'s operating data into *decisions that protect schedule and budget*.

slide_sequence.title: Executive Value Readout
slide_sequence.content_focus: Quarterly value delivered and decisions needed.

slide_sequence.title: The Quarter in Numbers
slide_sequence.content_focus: Health, momentum, and product usage

slide_sequence.title: Quarterly Health Signals
slide_sequence.content_focus: Current KPI health, licensed coverage, projects, and mobile usage.

slide_sequence.title: Adoption Momentum
slide_sequence.content_focus: Adoption score and active user movement across the quarter.

slide_sequence.title: Product Usage Mix
slide_sequence.content_focus: Workflow usage and strongest or weakest module signals.

slide_sequence.title: Value Risks & Decisions
slide_sequence.content_focus: Risks and sponsor decisions tied to next-quarter value.

slide_sequence.title: Next-Quarter Action Plan
slide_sequence.content_focus: Prioritized initiatives with owners, timing, and status.

slide_sequence.title: Expansion Opportunities
slide_sequence.content_focus: Where client tools and usage patterns suggest follow-up value.

slide_sequence.title: Source Notes
slide_sequence.content_focus: Source data and generation controls.

recipes.name: Product Update Deck
recipes.description: Product update structure that can expand from a concise customer update to a longer release-review deck using approved layouts only.
recipes.audience: Customer product champions, executive sponsors, operations leaders, and customer success teams

slide_sequence.title: Product Update
slide_sequence.content_focus: Client, period, and targeted product update context.

slide_sequence.title: Update Flow
slide_sequence.content_focus: Audience relevance, client tool fit, release highlights, rollout risks, and next steps.

slide_sequence.title: Audience Relevance
slide_sequence.content_focus: Why these updates matter for this client and audience.

slide_sequence.title: Installed Tool Fit
slide_sequence.content_focus: Owned tools, workflows, and product areas that shape the update.

slide_sequence.title: Readiness Signals
slide_sequence.content_focus: Adoption, active users, projects, and mobile usage that affect rollout readiness.

slide_sequence.title: Release Highlights
slide_sequence.content_focus: Chapter divider for grouped product updates.

slide_sequence.title: Release Detail
slide_sequence.content_focus: What changed, why it matters, launch type, region, and client implication.

slide_sequence.title: Readiness
slide_sequence.content_focus: Usage trajectory that supports or limits product rollout.

slide_sequence.title: Rollout Risks & Enablement
slide_sequence.content_focus: Risks, enablement needs, and product update actions.

slide_sequence.title: Client-Specific Rollout Plan
slide_sequence.content_focus: Rollout actions tied to owned tools, with owners, timing, and status.

slide_sequence.title: Source Notes
slide_sequence.content_focus: Source data and generation controls.

recipes.name: Ad Hoc Brand-Safe Deck
recipes.description: Flexible request path for creator prompts that do not match a predefined report, while still using only approved layout IDs.
recipes.audience: Prompt-selected audience, constrained by approved brand templates

slide_sequence.title: Brand-Safe Client Brief
slide_sequence.content_focus: Client, period, and prompt-selected brief context.

slide_sequence.title: Briefing Flow
slide_sequence.content_focus: Prompt priorities converted to approved sections.

slide_sequence.title: Brief Summary
slide_sequence.content_focus: Prompt-aligned summary without changing visual design.

slide_sequence.title: Relevant Metrics
slide_sequence.content_focus: Approved KPI scorecard adapted to the prompt.

slide_sequence.title: Signal Trend
slide_sequence.content_focus: Available trend proof from structured data.

slide_sequence.title: Implications & Recommendations
slide_sequence.content_focus: Prompt-aligned risks and recommendations.

slide_sequence.title: Next Steps
slide_sequence.content_focus: Actions that match the requested audience.

slide_sequence.title: Appendix: Source Notes
slide_sequence.content_focus: Source data and generation controls.
